dict.string: Bartleby listens to your microphone during meeting capture so it can transcribe and summarize the conversation.
Bartleby captures microphone audio during meeting capture so it can transcribe and summarize what you say.
Bartleby captures system audio (and a 2x2 placeholder video frame) so it can transcribe what you are watching or listening to.
Bartleby does not use the camera. This entry exists defensively because macOS may enforce camera usage descriptions on binaries that declare other capture entitlements.
